description: The 'native.country' column contains inconsistent values. 'USA' and 'usa' are considered different values, while 'U.S.A.' is missing.
The 'age' column contains string values instead of numeric values. This could lead to incorrect analysis.
The 'occupation' column contains object values instead of numeric values. This could lead to incorrect analysis.
The 'hours.per.week' column contains a placeholder value ('-99'). This could lead to missing data and could affect analysis.
The 'income' column contains an outlier value (200) that is significantly higher than other values. This could affect the analysis.
